name: Weekly CRO audit
prompt: Pull top 3 landing pages by sessions via GA4. Run page-cro skill against each. Output prioritised improvement list to outputs/cro-audits/{date}.md. Pick 1 for next test.

name: Weekly A/B test spec
prompt: Based on Tuesday's CRO audit, write A/B test spec: hypothesis, variant, success metric, sample size, duration. Save to outputs/ab-tests/{date}.md. iMessage Caner for approval.

name: Day 7 baseline screenshot pass
prompt: One-time on day 7. Screenshot every key page (home, top 3 product, cart, checkout, thank-you) on desktop + mobile via Playwright. Save to outputs/baseline-screenshots/{date}/. This is the before reference.

name: Monday A/B test review
prompt: For any A/B test running >7 days: pull GA4 + Shopify data, declare winner if statistical confidence >95%, otherwise extend or kill. Output decision log to outputs/ab-tests/decisions.jsonl.
